tree.name: Quinten Post
tree.tradeDescription: GSW traded cash to POR for Quinten Post
tree.note: Boston College center, drafted 52nd overall in 2024 by GSW, traded to OKC on draft night, re-acquired from POR for cash. Converted from two-way to regular contract Feb 7, 2025.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Portland Trail Blazers
